changelog: The TV home-screen row no longer flickers when returning to the home page: the channel guide is cached and the row is only rebuilt when the schedule actually changes. The end-of-episode overlay also hides its choice buttons when following the schedule and continuing the series lead to the same next episode.
description: Lightweight virtual TV channels: deterministic schedules over your own library, tuned in via normal direct playback at the live position. No transcoding, no tuner emulation.
name: LiteTV Channels
overview: TV channels from your library, without transcoding.
